After 9.Rb1 White chases away the Black queen and assumes control of the b-file. After the queen escapes to a3 (only move), White will have several options. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. '''1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.
